productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Black & Purple Check Shirt
description: Composition Purple and black check shirt made of 100% cotton that has white and grey accents, half sleeves with button flaps, collar with black panel detailing on the inseam of the collar, patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, embroidered brand name over the left chest and curved hemline Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Celebrate thecasual spirit in style in this spykar checked shirt. Designed for style and comfort, the cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and sports shoes and look great wherever you go.
